name: metrics: --summarize prints {p50, p95, p99, count, sum} for the named metric across the file
command: for v in 1 2 3 4 5; do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/metrics.sh" --emit lat --value $v --file m.jsonl; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/metrics.sh" --summarize lat --file m.jsonl 2>summary.json && grep -E '"count":5.*"sum":15' summary.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
